diagrams.title: Single-Level Directory Structure
diagrams.description: Shows one root directory containing all files with unique names
diagrams.purpose: Understanding basic directory organization and naming conflict problem

diagrams.title: Two-Level Directory Structure
diagrams.description: Shows Master File Directory with multiple User File Directories
diagrams.purpose: Understanding user isolation and private directories

diagrams.title: Tree-Structured Directory
diagrams.description: Hierarchical tree with root, subdirectories at multiple levels, and files as leaves
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing hierarchical organization and path navigation

diagrams.title: Acyclic Graph Directory
diagrams.description: DAG showing shared subdirectory referenced by multiple parent directories
diagrams.purpose: Understanding file sharing without circular references
